overview.value: Anthurium has glossy heart-shaped leaves and colorful waxy spathes. It prefers bright filtered light, airy soil, and warm humid conditions.

localizedContentsJSON.value: {"en":{"commonName":"Anthurium","overview":"Anthurium has glossy heart-shaped leaves and colorful waxy spathes. It prefers bright filtered light, airy soil, and warm humid conditions.","tips":"Use an airy mix with bark or perlite instead of dense potting soil."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"红掌","overview":"红掌有油亮心形叶片和彩色蜡质佛焰苞。它喜欢明亮散射光、透气介质和温暖湿润环境。","tips":"使用含树皮或珍珠岩的透气介质，不要用过于板结的土。"}}
